title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Threat Case: Spec Migration
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext spec migration increment in a production skill and MCP integration package. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Build Spec Migration evidence
steps.instruction: Append a agent-ext-spec-migration-yicsyu: manifest entry with concrete verify plus failure, owner, or repair evidence.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Spec Migration into observable performance evidence.

agent-ext-spec-migration-yicsyu:

  failure: [replace with the rejected condition]
  repair: [replace with a local reproduction and correction path]

options.text: The record names the assumption, applies Spec Migration, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

Apply the visible technique immediately, omit assumptions, and treat one successful output as complete proof.

steps.title: Defend the Spec Migration model
steps.instruction: Write a concise evidence note that explains when Spec Migration applies, what can fail, and how the changed case was verified.
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Track stable MCP specifications and test release-candidate migrations behind explicit compatibility gates.
